heading: Seniors farmers’ market nutrition program
label: 3007 Seniors farmers’ market nutrition program

children.heading: Funding
children.label: a Funding
children.text: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary of Agriculture shall use to carry out and expand the seniors farmers’ market nutrition program $20,600,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2023.

to provide resources in the form of fresh, nutritious, unprepared, locally grown fruits, vegetables, honey, and herbs from farmers’ markets, roadside stands, and community supported agriculture programs to low-income seniors;

to increase the domestic consumption of agricultural commodities by expanding or aiding in the expansion of domestic farmers’ markets, roadside stands, and community supported agriculture programs; and
to develop or aid in the development of new and additional farmers’ markets, roadside stands, and community supported agriculture programs.

children.heading: Exclusion of benefits in determining eligibility for other programs
children.label: c Exclusion of benefits in determining eligibility for other programs
children.text: The value of any benefit provided to any eligible seniors farmers’ market nutrition program recipient under this section shall not be considered to be income or resources for any purposes under any Federal, State, or local law.

children.heading: Prohibition on collection of sales tax
children.label: d Prohibition on collection of sales tax
children.text: Each State shall ensure that no State or local tax is collected within the State on a purchase of food with a benefit distributed under the seniors farmers’ market nutrition program.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: e Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may promulgate such regulations as the Secretary considers to be necessary to carry out the seniors farmers’ market nutrition program.

children.heading: Federal law not applicable
children.label: f Federal law not applicable
children.text: Section 1693–2 of title 15 shall not apply to electronic benefit transfer systems established under this section.o
